violations.text: Milk was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed milk in cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Inspector observed various milks in vessels outside of refrigeration. Additionally, pizza danish (sauce and cheese) was observed outside of refrigeration. PIC disposed of danish. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
